# Bilingual Boost

> Online English and Spanish classes with Paulina Poloca — personalized conversation-first lessons for learners in Latin America, Europe, and beyond.

Bilingual Boost helps people speak English and Spanish with confidence through live online classes, a free 30-minute trial lesson, and practical language-learning content.

## Main pages

- Home: https://www.bilingualboost.online/
- Book a free trial class: https://www.bilingualboost.online/reserva
- Free guide (email signup): https://www.bilingualboost.online/recursos
- Blog: https://www.bilingualboost.online/blog
- Contact: https://www.bilingualboost.online/#contacto

## About the teacher

Paulina Poloca teaches English and Spanish online with an empathetic, conversation-first approach. She speaks three languages fluently and focuses on helping learners overcome fear of speaking.

## Blog topics

Language learning tips, speaking confidence, conversation practice, study habits, English and Spanish for everyday life and work.

## Languages

The site supports Spanish (default), English, and Polish via a language toggle. Blog posts are published per locale under /blog.

## Optional

- Sitemap: https://www.bilingualboost.online/sitemap.xml
